default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hyperexponential and GrowthX to discuss content updates, review processes, and next steps for SEO-driven content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New agentic pipeline showing improved content quality; 4 new pieces to be shared today](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Transitioning to deeper, more technical topics requires better briefing and SME involvement](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Review process to be streamlined using Notion databases with automated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Short-term solution: publish approved content on Storyblock to start seeing traffic/impact](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Pipeline

  - [Approved topics moved to "Approved to Start" in content OS](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Some topics could be tagged under multiple clusters (e.g., comparing AI solutions, transforming insurance underwriting)](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on AI underwriting and underwriting workbench topics](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Agentic pipeline showing considerable improvement in output quality](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [4 new pieces of content to be shared today, rerun through the improved pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [Exploring deeper AI "jobs to be done" articles (e.g., build a radar based on spreadsheet)](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Potential to create content around specific actuary tasks and AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Investigating vertical-specific content (e.g., maritime, commercial insurance)](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Balancing between technical depth and SEO potential](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Review Process Improvements

  - [Proposal to use Notion for review workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
    1.  Article approval
    2.  Reviewer database (SME review)
    3.  Final approver database
  - [Automations to move content between databases and connect with Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Need to provide context for reviewers on the purpose of content (SEO, factual accuracy)](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Content Publishing and Visuals

  - [Short-term solution: Publish approved content on Storyblock for immediate traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [New images shared with geometric abstraction style; awaiting feedback from Mark (design lead)](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Potential to refresh and improve high-value existing content using the new pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up Notion databases and automations for streamlined review process](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Bailey to coordinate with team member on setting up Notion-Airtable automations](https://fathom.video/share/f_zbYL3AckFB_wdfprunxanodEoAzxiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
